falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 index closes above 5,200 (10% above current level) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by demonstrating sustained upward momentum contrary to the pattern's implied consolidation phase

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score exceeds 60 (current score: 40) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate extreme overbought conditions, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' signal's implied equilibrium state

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 15 billion shares/day (2024 August bottom's peak volume) without price confirmation
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Divergence between volume spikes and price action would invalidate the pattern's historical correlation, showing the current setup is not repeating the 2024 August bottom's behavior

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
